challenge.name: DEV June Solstice Game Jam

official_route_snapshot.prize_route: Best Ode to Alan Turing, one of five USD 200 winner slots.
official_route_snapshot.judge_proof: Play, Auto Demo, receipt verifier, manifest, and optional smoke test inspect the same loop.
official_route_snapshot.boundary: No Google AI claim, backend, account login, API key, or private data.

challenge.award_thesis: Helioigma is a playable ode, a judge-verifiable loop, and a finished static package: Turing fit through rotor state and checksum reasoning, solstice fit through daylight pressure, and review proof through Auto Demo, Rotor Trace, phase-proof copy, receipt verifier, manifest, and optional smoke test.
challenge.ode_note: The Alan Turing tribute is expressed through state, logic, alignment, verification, pressure, and machine-readable reasoning rather than pretending to simulate the Bombe or a biography.

rubric_snapshot.evidence: Daylight is the timer, nightfall is the fail state, and the final receipt marks a completed longest-day run.
The solstice prompt becomes a rotor puzzle with a visible state trace, not a static calendar or trivia screen.
Static canvas game, touch and keyboard controls, stable demo route, Nightfall failure recovery, checksum receipt, smoke test, and Pages-ready CI.
The DEV article, README, judge page, manifest, screenshots, and media give a short review path with clear boundaries.
Rotor-like alignment, target checking, XOR/binary language, and local verification carry the ode through mechanics.

status.public_review_surface: Public review uses the GitHub Pages game, judge page, judge review card, smoke test, phase-proof line, Nightfall recovery report, receipt verifier, manifest, source, and media links.
status.owner_publication_note: Public hosting and DEV article publication are external publication actions; this manifest records review evidence and never stores account data.
status.browser_storage: Only a local numeric best-score key is used.
status.audio: Optional generated Web Audio cues are off by default and require the Audio button or S shortcut.

originality.build_window: New static game package for the DEV June Solstice Game Jam period.
originality.template_boundary: Not a wrapper around a prior game template or third-party game kit.
originality.asset_boundary: Public media is generated from this build's browser UI and checked-in demo frames, not from a stock-art pack.

submission_checks: Best Ode to Alan Turing boundary
public_launch_gate: article still includes tags, demo, code, build notes, category, and no-secret boundary
challenge_compliance.prize_claim_boundary: Eligibility, release, tax, payment, and payout paperwork are account-owner steps if DEV selects the project.

proof.score_basis: Score rewards held daylight, streaks, and fewer wasted shifts before the final receipt checksum is built.
proof.phase_proof_line: Each phase exposes a compact proof cue that maps the current loop to solstice pressure, Turing-style state alignment, controlled shifts, or checksum verification.
proof.judge_run_summary: Completion panel includes a human-readable judge run summary with result, score, shifts, receipt, verification path, award signals, and Turing fit.
proof.mobile_completion_proof: mobile-complete-v1.png captures the same stable receipt, phase ledger, and Judge run summary in a 390px mobile viewport.
proof.nightfall_recovery: Failed manual runs show a Nightfall report with aligned nodes, held phases, score, shifts, next proof cue, Retry run, and Watch Demo Solve recovery.
proof.caveat: The receipt is a transparent demo checksum, not anti-cheat, identity, payout, or eligibility proof.

owner_actions_not_automated: Public repository and GitHub Pages publication
Public preflight after Pages is live
Any prize, tax, or payout steps
